seo.title: Excellence Squad - Proven Excellence
seo.description: Excellence Squad aims to be a preferred partner for hotel industry players. By excelling in our profession, we help you excel in yours!

hero.headline: What if your guests' online reviews became your best marketing campaign?
hero.cta: This button could change your next Booking reviews
hero.partnersLine: Preferred partner for hotels & aparthotels in Belgium & Luxembourg

about.title: A hotel partner to strengthen your guest promise
about.body: Excellence Squad (a business unit of Excellence Squad Group) aspires to be a preferred partner for the hotel industry. By excelling in our profession, we support you in excelling in yours! Through a comprehensive multi-service offering covering all support activities necessary for the core operation of the hotel, we aim to position ourselves as guarantors of a constructive collaboration that fosters lasting peace of mind for our clients.

housekeeping.title: Housekeeping
housekeeping.desc: Room attendants, Executive housekeepers, Floor supervisors, Runners

frontoffice.title: Front Office
frontoffice.desc: Reception, Night audit, porters, valets, etc.

academy.title: Hospitality Academy
academy.desc: Leveraging our sector knowledge, we created our own training academy ‘Hospitality Academy by DS’.

cards.title: Hotel staff
cards.desc: Clear distinction between room attendants and cleaners, trained via our Hospitality Academy.

cards.title: SLA & KPI
cards.desc: Service level agreements with hotel-specific KPIs.

cards.title: Mystery guest
cards.desc: Independent audits 1–2 times a year to ensure quality.

cards.title: Guest reviews
cards.desc: Commitment to maintain/improve cleanliness scores on Booking.com.

cards.title: Hospitality Academy
cards.desc: Leveraging our sector knowledge, we created our own training academy ‘Hospitality Academy by DS’.

cards.title: ICT integration
cards.desc: By leveraging Roomchecking, seamlessly integrated with the PMS, we offer real-time visibility of room status for immediate response and efficient task allocation.

cards.title: Eco-responsible approach
cards.desc: This innovative approach reduces environmental footprint and supports certifications such as ‘Green Key’.

approach.title: Our ‘Hospitality’ approach
approach.body: Thanks to their experience in your hotel, your guests will be eager to return and share positive feedback on booking sites and review platforms, positively impacting your hotel's performance and image. As hoteliers, our clients look for a partner who understands that in hospitality, everything is about hospitality. Excellence Squad has developed a hospitality-driven approach designed to meet your guests' ever-rising expectations.

capital.body: Excellence Squad specializes in the hotel industry. We don't clean offices or factories: we are a hotel services provider.

stats.label: of decisions made without managerial intervention (via mobile app and automated instructions)
time savings in daily coordination (reducing friction between housekeeping, reception, and field staff)
of internal unnecessary trips (thanks to real-time alerts and prioritization of interventions)

sustain.title: Commitment
sustain.body: We adopt eco-responsible practices, train our teams in sustainable cleaning, work with committed suppliers and support the Green Key certification. Our goal: make hotel cleaning a driver of environmental performance.

clients.title: Client testimonials
quotes: Excellence Squad enabled us to scale with hotel-level rigor while keeping aparthotel flexibility. A true operational partner.
With Excellence Squad, we finally found a partner who understands the demands of upscale hospitality. Our guests feel it, and our teams breathe.
This provider puts the guest experience at the center. Excellence Squad has a perfect grasp of hotel challenges.
We're delighted with the work by housekeeper Najat and her housekeeping staff. The team is detail-oriented, professional, and reliable.

images.heroAlt: Excellence Squad team delivering excellence in a luxury hotel
